name: autofix
description: Auto-fix CodeRabbit review comments - get CodeRabbit review comments from GitHub and fix them interactively or in batch
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 autofix 相關工作
幫我啟用 autofix 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 autofix

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the autofix skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
